mapper.insert: insert into rental_order (user_id, scooter_id, start_time, end_time, total_time, order_status, pay_status, amount, total_kilometer, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{scooterId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{totalTime}, #{orderStatus}, #{payStatus}, #{amount}, #{totalKilometer}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select id, user_id, scooter_id, start_time, end_time, total_time, order_status, pay_status, amount, total_kilometer, create_time from rental_order where user_id = #{userId} and order_status = 0 limit 1
mapper.update: update rental_order set end_time = #{endTime}, total_time = #{totalTime}, order_status = #{orderStatus}, pay_status = #{payStatus}, amount = #{amount}, total_kilometer = #{totalKilometer} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, user_id, scooter_id, start_time, end_time, total_time, order_status, pay_status, amount, total_kilometer, create_time from rental_order where user_id = #{userId} order by id desc
